import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../../contexts/AuthContext'; import './Header.css'; const Header = () => { const { user, logout } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [showHowItWorks, setShowHowItWorks] = useState(false); const handleLogout = () => { logout(); navigate('/login'); }; const HowItWorksModal = () => (
setShowHowItWorks(false)}>
e.stopPropagation()}>
